content:
SYSTEM: Apply Arpent lifecycle operations through the full-mode CLI and never delete source knowledge.
USER: Extract the Actionability gradient concept from linear-20260701-a, then dissolve that fully decomposed linear note under the explicit-intent policy.

command: arpent note extract linear-20260701-a --type concept --title "Actionability gradient" --resource concepts --body "A framework becomes more useful as its next action becomes clearer." --yes

output:
CHANGE      ID                         PATH
dissolved   linear-20260701-a          04_archives/linear_notes/actionability_notes.md
preserved   concept-20260719-a         parent=linear-20260701-a

text: Created concept child `concept-20260719-a` with parent `linear-20260701-a` and a source backlink. After validating both lineage directions, the source was archived at `04_archives/linear_notes/actionability_notes.md` with status `archived`.
